Stop.prompt: Before finishing: Did you complete the verification loop? (1) Ran /simplify on changed code (2) Ran tests (3) Fixed issues and re-verified (4) Confirmed a staff engineer would approve. If ANY step was skipped, complete it now. If no code was changed this turn, proceed.

If you made code changes this session that affect behavior, architecture, or public APIs: run /update-docs to keep documentation in sync. Skip if changes were trivial (formatting, typos, comments only).

PostToolUse.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -E '\.(ts|js)$' | head -1 | xargs -I{} npx prettier --write {} 2>/dev/null; exit 0

PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'input=$(jq -r .tool_input.command); if echo "$input" | grep -qE "git push.*--force|git reset --hard|git push origin main|git push origin master"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous git operation. Use feature branches and regular push." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'
